title: astragalus frigidus
intro: Astragalus frigidus, also known as the alpine milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family, native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus frigidus is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or tea, and its roots and rhizomes are also used in herbal medicine, often in combination with other plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
